assets.prompt_hint_zh: 粮税小吏身份锁：全局 C016 母卡直继承，骨白面壳、暗色复眼、细触须、白蜡高账吏帽；只开册/点税，不持兵器、不扣腕。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Grain-tax clerk identity lock: exact global C016 inheritance with bone-white face shell, dark compound eyes, thin feelers and wax-white accountant hat; opens/registers tax only, never armed, never gripping wrists.

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 混血奴兵动作锁：170-200cm 人形骨架，五指人手、硬化甲片、骨白腕绑，低后背只有一根极细金钱尾辫；只扣腕/牵绳/搬粮，不开册，不变纯虫族爪。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Mixed slave-soldier action lock: 170-200cm human upright skeleton, five-finger human hand, hardened chitin plates, bone-white wrist binding and one very thin low money-tail braid; grips/ropes/moves grain only, never opening registers or becoming pure insect claws.

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 纯虫族小兵封路锁：200-230cm 非人虫身、反关节腿、爪足、短矛/钩镰；只持械封路警戒，不开册、不扣腕、不搬粮。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Pure insect infantry route-blocking lock: 200-230cm nonhuman insect body, reverse-jointed legs, claw feet, short spear or hook-sickle; armed perimeter only, never register work, wrist grip or grain handling.

asset_metadata_warning: E01_R001 keeps the approved centered exterior epic siege style and is the texture standard. E01_R002 now has a closer gate-impact candidate at 01/assets/reference-frames/r002e01.closer-impact-candidate-20260611-4k.png pending user visual QC; canonical r002e01.png has not been replaced. SC001-SH001 uses gatehouse bell sound only, with no visible bell or bell frame required in R001/R002. E01_R003 still needs regeneration for the new half-collapsed wall-side soldier frame, and E01_R010-E01_R013 remain high-score approved SC003 primary I2V reference frames.

sc002_same_ground_height_scale_handoff_2.role_lock: C016B official inherits global insect face/white hat and opens register; C017 slave soldier grips/moves grain with five fingers and one thin low money-tail braid; C018 pure insect infantry towers over humans on the same ground and blocks routes with weapons.

sc002_user_visual_qc_rejection_2026_06_1.reported_issue: 角色一致性仍未满足，包括身高差设定。
sc002_user_visual_qc_rejection_2026_06_1.frame_use_rule: Do not use current SC002 R005-R009 candidates for video production; regenerate at 4096x2304 after identity and same-ground height-scale relock.
sc002_user_visual_qc_rejection_2026_06_1.prompt_lock: 2026-06-11 用户视觉 QC 退回后的重生硬锁：SC002 参考帧必须先让角色身份和身高差一眼成立。使用同一泥地/同一车道地平线：C025 村民为普通人族低位基准，C017 奴兵为 175-185cm 代表体量且保留五指硬化人手与低位金钱尾辫，C016B 粮税虫吏为 195-205cm 画面代表值并只开册下令，C018 纯虫族小兵为 215-230cm 站立等效并只持短矛/钩镰封路。所有脚底、靴底、爪足或地面接触点必须落在同一可读泥地平面；如果角色低伏或弯腰，仍必须通过肩高、头壳、兵器、门框或旁站基准证明其真实等效身高。
sc002_user_visual_qc_rejection_2026_06_1.negative_lock: 不要继续使用 2026-06-11 被用户退回的 SC002 候选帧作为通过参考；不要让官吏、奴兵、纯虫族小兵和普通人族同身高；不要让 C016B 站桌子、检查台、粮袋、台阶或车板造高；不要让 C017 变纯虫族爪手或普通人族士兵；不要让 C018 缺兵器、搬粮、扣腕或开册；不要用透视、裁切、前景放大、低伏遮挡来掩盖身高差。

scale_consistency_lock.source: bible/characters.md functional-role height locks plus user visual QC rejection on 2026-06-11
required_scale_ladder: C025 ordinary human baseline: children 105-145cm, youths 145-165cm, ordinary adults 160-190cm, elders visually shorter from stoop.
C017 mixed slave soldier: canon range 170-200cm; SC002 representative should read 175-185cm and always below the selected C016/C018 on screen.
C016 low insect official: canon range 190-210cm; representative screen height about 200cm, taller than villagers and C017 by true body height, narrow and non-combat.
C018 pure insect infantry: canon range 200-230cm; representative standing-equivalent about 220cm, visibly taller and more alien than C016/C017/C025, armed perimeter only.
C019 heavy insect soldier: canon range 220-260cm; representative about 245cm, broader and heavier than C018, shield-wall or gate-pressure only.
scale_consistency_lock.same_ground_rule: Feet, soles, claws or ground-contact points must align on one visible baseline or one continuous muddy ground plane; height difference may not be created by tables, platforms, stairs, grain sacks, carts, threshold steps, foreground enlargement, lens distortion or crop tricks.
scale_consistency_lock.camera_rule: For cards, include one same-ground scale lineup strip with ruler ticks or doorway/human baseline. For reference frames, keep camera distance and ground plane readable enough that C025/C017/C016/C018/C019 hierarchy can be checked without guessing.
scale_consistency_lock.role_boundary_rule: C016 opens/registers/orders, C017 grips/moves grain with five hardened human fingers, C018 blocks routes with weapons, C019 guards gates with shield mass, C025 remains ordinary humans with no insect features.
rejection_rules: reject if C016, C017, C018 and C025 read as the same height class
reject if C017 becomes a pure insect, metal-glove guard, ordinary human soldier or loses the low money-tail braid/hardened five-finger hand
reject if C016 becomes a human accountant, blue high official, priest, slave soldier or combat soldier
reject if C018 lacks reverse-jointed legs, claw feet, pure-insect body or visible spear/hook-sickle when guarding
reject if C019 does not read broader/heavier than C018 when present
reject if C025 civilians gain insect traits or military gear
reject if apparent height comes from platform, table, stairs, grain sacks, cart bed, foreground scale or crouch hiding true standing-equivalent height
